violations.text: The ceiling, evaporator unit fan shrouds, and floor under shelving in the walk-in cooler were observed to have an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan covers in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024

The floor in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of soil residue and dried spilled liquid. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024
